arts.ttl: Tottenham v Eintracht Frankfurt: Europa League quarter-final, first leg – live
arts.sum: Europa League updates from 8pm BST kick-off Follow Lyon v Manchester United with Rob Smyth Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | Mail Simon “The way he’s thinking football, the way he was playing football with his teams. I’m very proud of him,” says Dino Toppmöller, the Frankfurt manager, of his dad, Klaus. Dino was named after Dino Zoff, the legendary Italy goalkeeper, who notably was once extremely grumpy with me on the phone. To be fair, I’d be pretty grumpy if I had to speak to myself in Italian, I’m rubbish at speaking Italian. The protagonists in tonight’s drama will be the following: Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Tottenham vs. Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: The lineups for Thursday's Europa League clash between Tottenham and Eintracht Frankfurt have been announced.

arts.ttl: £50m Dean Huijsen holds talks with Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool, Newcastle and Spurs
arts.sum: Representatives of Premier League giants Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool, Newcastle, and Tottenham all met with Bournemouth's Dean Huijsen in the last week, per David Ornstein of The Athletic. Huijsen has a £50m release clause and is also courted by Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: How to watch Tottenham vs Eintracht Frankfurt - TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Tottenham face the first of two season-defining games this evening as they welcome Eintracht Frankfurt to north London for their Europa League quarter-final first leg. As part of their coverage of the fixture, TNT Sports will be live streaming Tottenham vs Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Who will Tottenham play in the Champions League semi-final if they beat Eintracht Frankfurt?
arts.sum: Should Tottenham reach the semi-finals, the first leg will be sandwiched by Premier League matches against Liverpool on Sunday, April 27, and West Ham on Saturday, May 3. Who could Tottenham play in the Europa League semi-final?

arts.ttl: Are there away goals in the Europa League? Rules explained before Tottenham vs Frankfurt
arts.sum: With that in mind, football.london takes a look at what the rules are on away goals in the Europa League... Tottenham take on Eintracht Frankfurt in the first-leg of their Europa League quarter-final clash on Thursday night with Ange Postecoglou's men looking to keep their season alive.

arts.ttl: Tottenham suffer new injury concern before Frankfurt clash as attacker 'sent for scans' on hamstring issue
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur allegedly suffer a brand-new injury blow, as attacker Wilson Odobert is sent for scans after complaining of hamstring tightness.
